programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Police track down a thief who specializes in elderly people.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: On today's patrol, Malloy and Reed try to corral cattle that are wandering into the downtown area, pull over a speeding bicyclist, chase down a man with a stolen guitar and break up a bar fight. After their shift is over, Reed and his wife witness a gas station holdup on their way to dinner with Malloy and his girlfriend.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Officer Wells appears to have met his match with a new partner who always insists on doing things his own way. Today's shift features a hot-headed husband who's decided he needs a gun to protect his home, and a neglected girl who causes a scare while playing.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony kick back and relax watching FIVE Toon In With Me cartoon debuts!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Miss Landers is having Beaver's class do projects on the colonial period and Beaver is one of three students creating posters. Whoever makes the best one gets a prize and Beaver is sure that Ward will paint the poster for him.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A neighborhood cleaning woman, Mrs. Manners, gets a request from June asking her to help out a couple times during the week. Mrs. Manners is too busy herself but instead sends over her daughter, a girl whom Wally instantly falls for.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Cautious Coquette
programme.desc: Mason navigate his way through a hornet's nest of murder, hit-and-run, secret marriage and a missing witness.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Julie's in Baltimore defending a man accused of killing a newspaper editor who besmirched his name. Complicating matters is the prosecutor, who just happens to be Julie's ex-husband.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A copycat recreates a shocking unsolved murder from the past. Gillespie feels threatened after Ted Marcus suggests that Virgil should become the Chief. The situation becomes more tense after Virgil criticizes Parker and Bubba's actions.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Olivia becomes emotional (menopausal symptoms) and runs away from home to visit a relative

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: After spending eight years in prison, Collie Patten plots his revenge on Matt.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe frantically searches for help when Ben injures his back after his new horse throws him down a steep hill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for escape after he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When the wagon train passes through town, habitually drunk Jeremy Dow finds that his past has caught up with him. His choices: continue running or face the demons from his past when he is confronted with this wife and son on the train.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Conducting a fire inspection, Roy and John rescue a diver in a fish tank. A birthday boy eats raw dough and gets a stomachache. An experiment in firefighter nutrition becomes an obsession for Chet. A woman goes into labor while her mother experiences chest pains. Capt. Stanley is severely injured when he gets an electric shock from a fallen power line.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: B.J. writes home to his wife, Peg, reporting Klinger's escape attempts, the visit of a formidable chaplain and one of Frank's goof-ups.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye tangles with a tough Army colonel, Colonel Spiker; B.J. helps Zale, who's received a Dear John letter; and Frank looks endlessly for Korean saboteurs.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank has a fever and makes a will, leaving all his money to his wife and all his clothes to Hot Lips.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A wounded colonel's gun, a showpiece, disappears, and Hawkeye and B.J. play a hunch and bluff Frank, who has it, into returning it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie are left alone while Aunt Bee goes out of town. Peggy, Andy's new girlfriend, takes great delight in helping the boys handle things. Floyd warns Andy that Peggy is using her feminine wiles to "snare" him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The mayor calls in an investigator from the state capital to help solve a string of cow thefts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale acquires a baby hippopotamus, which the Clampetts see and mistake for a giant hog. However, Elly May knows the difference, realizing that this is a hippo. Granny is desperate to become the owner of this "hawg," knowing how much meat this critter will provide. Drysdale agrees to sell it to the Clampetts, but Granny thinks the price is too high.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph and Norton buy a T.V. set together and constantly fight over what to watch.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In an effort to transport a German anti-radar to London, Hogan passes LeBeau off as a fortune teller after convincing Klink he was struck by lightning.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps three German scientists escape to England.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired gun Conny Miller. When Miller returns to town, he is challenged to visit Sykes' grave.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Capering Camera
programme.desc: Scandalous photos and blackmail lead to suicide...or is it murder? Mason is resolved to find out.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A costumed thief calling himself "The Crimson Crusader" has been stealing comic books, movie posters and publicity photos of various superheroes.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman consults an attorney about her husband, whom she believes is a murderer.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man is enraged when he learns that his wife is unfaithful.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A police lieutenant is suspended after shooting and killing a known gangster at a police raid. It is suspected that the killing was revenge driven because the same gangster was responsible for the death of the police lieutenant's friend. Mannix sets out to prove that no revenge was at play.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Reclusive Virginia McKellar insists her sister did not die five years earlier, as everyone believes, and she'll willing to pay Cannon to prove it.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty investigates a series of mishaps terrorizing the faculty of a private girls' school.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A shooting case exemplifies how the police gather—and why they must sometimes withhold—evidence.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday investigates a woman's claim that her husband is an armed robber.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed thinks he's got a great deal lined up on a used boat, but Malloy's convinced there's something fishy going on. While on patrol, they search for a man who sold a stolen horse to a riding academy, use an informant's tip to investigate a suspicious restaurant parking lot attendant and face an accusation of stealing a socialite's diamond ring during a burglary investigation.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are on the lookout for a traveling business man driving a green pinto, who called his wife in Nebraska and told her he was going to commit suicide at 2 PM. Meanwhile, they search for a woman who abandoned her newborn baby in a garbage can, and get a tip from an elderly woman about a group of car strippers.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "All aboard Bill's new boat, "Toast to Coast"!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After joining the dramatic club at school, Beaver is given the lead role in a play. However, after reading the script, he discovers he must kiss a girl and wants out of the production.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A close friend of June's moves into the neighborhood and June arranges to have Wally show the new kid, Dudley, around school. However, everyone thinks Dudley is a creep and Eddie and Lumpy plan to make a fool of Dudley at a party.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Haunted Husband
programme.desc: Hitchhiking because her purse was stolen, Claire Olger is picked up by Michael Greeley. Intoxicated, he loses control of the car and collides with an oncoming truck. Arriving at the scene of the accident, the police find Claire alone in the car and the truck driver dead.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock agrees to defend aging clown Homer Fleming after he's charged with the murder of his long-time partner. After asking Conrad to go undercover as a roustabout at the circus, Matlock learns that the deceased had many enemies.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tibbs, Gillespie and Bubba pursue different leads in a bizarre murder case and the Chief realizes that the killer has plans for him.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The Waltons have one remaining payment on their mortgage

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt tries to prevent a range war as a rancher takes steps to cut off the homesteaders' water supply.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A father rejects his dying daughter and the son she had out of wedlock.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Micah has an infamous outlaw, Charlie Gordo, in his jail waiting for the U.S. marshal from Denver to take Gordo to the Yuma prison for hanging. With the arrival of the stage, Micah finds that the lawman has been killed, and he has to look to his friends to defend the jail from Gordo's gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas' old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Wounded Bill Strode arrives in camp looking for Flint. Strode, who saved Flint's life in Abilene, asks Flint to help him get to Fort Kearny. Flint learns the itchy Strode is being hunted by bounty hunter Earl Packer and Strode has changed.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John gets everyone but Roy excited about buying into a nearby hot dog stand. By the time Roy gets interested, the stand burns down. A man is injured in an accident with a power lawn mower.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Mail brings a letter to Frank saying his wife is divorcing him, and one to Potter telling him he's going to be a grandfather.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar gets the help of Hawkeye and B.J. to procure something Colonel Potter says he's fond of, but that's hard to come by—tomato juice.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar writes home to his mother, as Hawkeye conducts the camp foot inspection, and Colonel Potter gets some shrapnel in his backside.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Potter decides Frank would be less of a pain if the others were friendlier to him; they oblige, with some startling results.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy shows up for a date with Peggy McMillan only to learn her old friend, Don, has arrived unexpectedly, leading to a string of misunderstandings and Barney's attempts at help.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney's ability to be a lawman is put to the test with some peddlers and he fails. His confidence is shattered until Andy steps in behind the scenes and warns the peddlers of "Fife the Fierce."

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed visits the bank to tell Drysdale that he plans to go back home to look for a wife so Elly May can finally have a mother. Drysdale tries to think of a bride for Jed, and when Mrs. Fenwick visits, he decides that she would be a perfect match for Jed.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph's advice to a lodge brother on how to be head of the household has his wife (Alice's sister) in tears.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and Klink go to England to steal an allied airplane as part of Hogan's plan to expose Nazi spies in London.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men pose as Nazi officers to get an American traitor to divulge the names of his German superiors.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The residents of a small town are terrorized by a young boy who has the ability to read minds and make anything he wishes a reality.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Ice-cold Hands
programme.desc: After winning tickets at a horse track lead to accusations of theft and eventually murder, Mason must defend a woman caught in the middle.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Posing as orange growers, Friday and Gannon attempt to bust a gambling operation.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man tries to tell another man that his wife is cheating on him.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A chicken farmer murders his gold-digging girlfriend but the police can't convict him without the body.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix has been hired to deliver from London to L.A. jewelry worth $8 million dollars. But before he can complete his task, he is kidnapped and replaced with a double.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: The man who arranged the death of an embezzler cannot find the loot. But Cannon might, when he investigates on behalf of the man framed for the murder. But Cannon's client might be closer to the case than he lets on.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: J.R. goes from skeptic to believer when he helps a psychic investigate the disappearances of several young women.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon confront a phony magazine salesperson.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: It's a job half done when police nab a narcotics manufacturer: they still need his backer.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: On his way to an auto mechanic, Malloy is ambushed and kidnapped by a group of drug runners who plan to use him to secure the release of one of their associates.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy is asked to fill in for Sgt. MacDonald, leaving Reed to partner with a young probationary officer who lets his judgment be clouded by his constant need to prove himself. On patrol, they search for a purse snatcher inside a church, encounter a burglary in progress at a closed pharmaceutical company and search for an armed robbery suspect in a lumber yard.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill competes in Benny the I-T Feller's Hillbilly Hijinks, an unorthodox sporting competition with events like 'Toilet Seat Toss' and 'Armpit Serenade'."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally invites Eddie to spend the night. However, during a game of chess, Eddie accuses Wally of cheating and they get into a big argument ending with Wally ordering Eddie to go home.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver gets out of school early to go to the dentist, which prompts Gilbert to drop off his report card. However, Eddie and Lumpy get a hold of it and Eddie decides to alter Beaver's arithmetic grade from a D- to a B+.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lonely Heiress
programme.desc: Heiress Marilyn Cartright places an ad in a magazine in order to find love and companionship. In reality, Marilyn is looking for the con artist who swindled and drove her sister to suicide.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When an aging actress is found dead, stabbed with the prop knife that made her famous, suspicion lands on the horror film director who wanted her off his picture.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The murder of well-respected man turns up a shocking secret about his family.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Members of Flossie Brimmer's family visit the mountain

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The friendship between two trappers is ruined when one leaves the other to die during an Indian attack.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a greedy mine owner in the town of Prince River forces Mexican farmers off their land, Hoss and Joe come to the rescue.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle—and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The pangs of first love are painful for Mark: the object of his affections has eyes for another.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A Quaker schoolteacher heads to the Arapaho nation on the wagon train after her husband is killed. She meets the chief and his willingness to fight another indian nation puts her right in the middle of each tribe's pride and customs.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John becomes the victim of a hit and run. While hospitalized, he flirts with his physical therapist and deals with a nurse who seems to have it in for him. The rest of the station must adjust to a difficult replacement.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is injured in a jeep accident and, aware he has a concussion, babbles to a Korean family to keep himself awake.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank tries to distinguish himself by selling the camp garbage, but it's Hawkeye who finds a use for it: he dumps it on a troublesome Colonel Coner.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank has Hawkeye up on charges of mutiny for usurping his authority when Potter was away on leave and Frank was the commanding officer. B.J., Potter and Radar are in attendance of the preliminary hearing, at which they hear conflicting versions of what happened.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th turns up a sick helicopter pilot, 'Smilin' Jack, who doesn't want to quit, and a twice-wounded GI who does.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayor Stoner declares the town's marching band a disgrace and refuses to allocate money for its annual trip to the state competition. Andy takes matters into his own hands, with help from Bobby Fleet and his Band with a Beat.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Madeline Grayson, a rich widow that Floyd has been "pen-palling" with, announces in her next letter that she wants to meet him face-to-face. Of course, the whole time Floyd has been pretending in his letters to be a wealthy entrepreneur.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is glued to the television set the Clampetts received for Christmas, especially because of one TV Western star, Quirt Manly. She really wants to meet him, and Drysdale arranges for it to happen. And Granny already has him set up for Elly May, because she knows he is probably the only who can tame the vine-swinging girl. However, when he arrives at the mansion, the Clampetts see he isn’t who they thought he was. Quirt Manly is actually a short actor with a high-pitched voice who doesn’t do any of his own stunts or riding.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph tries to learn how to play golf to impress his boss, and, of course, the situation turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: That's No Lady, That's My Spy
programme.desc: Newkirk poses as a general's wife to get penicillin to an ill underground leader.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan arranges for a beautiful Russian spy to convince Klink that the Kommandant should volunteer for service at the Russian front. Hogan's payoff: some secret papers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS captain returns to the ruins of Dachau and begins reminiscing on the power he enjoyed there, until he finds himself on trial by those who died at his hands.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Bountiful Beauty
programme.desc: After Stephanie Carew's body is found floating in a swimming pool, the coroner’s report finds that she died in the ocean and her corpse was then placed in the pool. Meanwhile, the police have learned unsettling information about best-selling novelist Deborah Dearborn, and it ties her to the murder.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gary Crosby plays a hippie whose wife has been persuaded—by other hippies—to pass bad checks.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman heads for the mountain in Switzerland on which her husband died while climbing.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An angry young man accurately predicts an impending death.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: While convalescing in a clinic after a bad car accident, Mannix helps a patient whom a doctor wants to blame for murder.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: An expert hunter and gamekeeper dies, mauled to death by a lion that was supposedly tranquilized. His widow hires Cannon to figure out what happened and who is responsible.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby tangles with violent veterans of the Vietnam war as he attempts to clear the name of an Army deserter who's still missing.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon set out to muzzle thieves who steal dogs and then collect hefty rewards from the owners.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Working with the slimmest of leads, police attempt to identify a woman's body.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: As Malloy continues his fill-in assignment for Sgt. MacDonald, Reed is paired with the department's first female officer, which presents both of them with a series of unique challenges. On patrol, they detain an underage drunk driver with a dismissive mother, search a parking garage for car strippers and help round up a large group of young people causing trouble outside a rock concert.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After a well known hype is released because of a lack of probable cause, Reed decides to temporarily join the narcotics squad to hone his skills. The demands of the assignment quickly take their toll on him personally, and his worst fears are realized when Malloy assists in a narcotics bust.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toony and Bill tour the U.S. territory of Guam, from its waterfalls to its foods."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A police officer catches Richard throwing rocks at the windows of an old abandoned house. When asked for his name, he tells the officer it is Theodore Cleaver. Meanwhile, Ward has joined a committee to organize a youth center.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally falls head over heels for a popular girl in school, Ginny Townsend. To get them together, June slyly invites Ginny on a picnic and the Cleaver's quickly discover that Ginny is not exactly a barrel of laughs.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Green-eyed Sister
programme.desc: Arthur West, a disreputable private investigator, has found J. J. Stanley in a cheap motel. He knows Stanley and his partner, Ned Bain, were involved in the embezzlement of the Texas National Bank. He wants to blackmail Bain into giving him money to keep quiet.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a victim of a group of con men is charged with murdering one of them, Matlock takes the case while Michelle attempts to get close to the remaining con artists.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil is delighted when Matthew his former partner from Philadelphia comes to visit. But he soon learns his friend has another purpose for coming to Sparta. Althea is uncomfortable because she and Matthew were romantically involved before she met Virgil and she realizes that he is unwilling to accept the fact that she chose Virgil over him. Meanwhile the F.B.I. enlist Sparta P.D.'s aid in hiding a witness.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Ben and Jim-Bob get on each other's nerves. They end up dating each other's girlfriends.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Phoebe Strunk and her murderous clan terrorize Dodge.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben gives a job at the Ponderosa to Pepper Shannon, a one-time hero and outlaw made famous in dime novels, on the condition he stays away from Jamie, an admirer of his.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction—a withdrawal at gunpoint.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sammy Davis Jr. stars as Tip Corey, son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A retired captain and 10 boys join the wagon train on their way to California. Hitching a ride was all the captain thought he was involving the boys in, until he meets a man on the train with a secret resentment.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy and John are assigned to work the big football game at the Coliseum. A woman accidentally pulls her husband off the roof into a tree. At the game, the paramedics treat a choking victim, a man with breathing difficulties, an injured photographer and a TV announcer with heart trouble.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is reunited with a woman he thought was out of his life forever, but who never altogether leaves.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A sudden deluge of wounded at the 4077th is followed by a fire and a rainstorm, which makes matters difficult for the staff.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "A rumor that there's going to be a practice bug-out causes anxiety. When Potter assembles the unit in an attempt to squelch the rumor, the call comes in to bug out, and the rumor suddenly comes to life! Meanwhile, Hawkeye begins surgery on a patient with a spinal injury. The bug-out proceeds without him, Hot Lips and Radar, and they quickly learn after the unit departs that they're in the midst of the front. When Potter, Mulcahy, BJ, Frank and the others arrive at the buildings which had been scouted by helicopter, they find the house full of "business girls," and Potter gives them Klinger's dresses to persuade them to leave the house. A helicopter comes to evacuate the spinal injury patient, and just as the three get ready to go to the new location, they find the 4077 is already returning, and eventually everyone reunites back at the camp, what with the Chinese being repulsed. "

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A rumor that there's going to be a camp relocation causes anxiety. When Potter assembles the unit in an attempt to squelch the rumor, the call comes in that the rumor is indeed fact!

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie is afraid that Andy's new girlfriend, Peggy, will take his place in his father's heart, and sets out to sabotage their relationship.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Floyd run out of gas while coming home from a fishing trip. While looking for a telephone they are captured by three female escaped convicts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro has an idea of starting a new business, a five-second car wash. But Jed and Granny don’t care for the idea and think that Jethro and Elly need jobs to fill their time. At the bank, Milburn is taking care of his nephew, little Milby. Jane doesn’t want to take care of the sneaky child and Drysdale doesn’t have the time. When Jed visits asking for jobs for Elly and Jethro, he says that Elly May can take care of Milby.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.sub-title: A Woman's Work Is Never Done
programme.desc: Tired of Ralph's endless domestic complaints, Alice takes a job and leaves a maid to take care of the housework.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink is appointed defense counsel for a German officer on trial for treason who has secret plans intended for London. Hogan helps Klink prove the officer's innocence in order to secure the plans.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The guys find a new rocket that has landed near camp. They are at a loss on how to get it back to England for study when Marya and her rocket-designing husband enter camp.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Nervous Neighbor
programme.desc: Private investigator Paul Drake is sent to locate Charles Fuller's missing mother. Not only is she missing, she is suspected in a murder that happened the day before she went missing. When Drake locates the missing women, he learns that she was found badly beaten in a field six months earlier and has lost her memory.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A girl's life hangs in the balance as the detectives search for the dog that bit her.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man seeks revenge after being robbed by hitchhikers.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man destined to live in an iron lung learns that his wife has been unfaithful to him.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix lends a hand to a police lieutenant who's pursuing an escaped mobster into the Santa Monica mountains.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Reverend" Will can heal the sick by the power of faith. Or can he? Either way, his "powers" won't keep a witness to murder from coming forward, and that means... another murder.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby tangles with violent veterans of the Vietnam war as he attempts to clear the name of an Army deserter who's still missing.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Other people's credit cards are found in the possession of a forest ranger.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday arrests a member of his class for possession of marijuana.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy recovers from his gunshot wound and returns to patrol with Reed, where they investigate a suspicious burglary call at a school for women, and confront a pair of armed intruders in a warehouse full of mannequins. Meanwhile, Reed contemplates taking the investigator's exam as he prepares to give a speech in acceptance of the medal of valor for saving Malloy's life.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy plans to resign at the end of shift due to the death of his previous partner but is assigned a rookie partner, Reed. Malloy decides the green Reed is worthy of his effort to train him, leading Malloy to stay on the job.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony celebrate the debut of Speedy Gonzalez."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: While Beaver's class is having a group picture taken, Gilbert goads Beaver into making a face with him when they snap the picture. However, when the picture is actually taken, Gilbert backs out and Beaver is the only one making a face.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver making trades with his classmates is beginning to get on Ward and June's nerves because he seems to be the one who always walks away shorthanded. June especially thinks Beaver got the short stick in his latest trade when he comes home with a pet rat.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Fugitive Nurse
programme.desc: Janet Norris is charged with poisoning her doctor husband just before he flew to his death in his private plane. Further investigation reveals that Dr. Norris did not die in the plane crash and that he is in Mexico with his nurse mistress.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Accused of murdering his uncle in a drunken rage, Matlock takes the case of Drew Carey, a spoiled, self-centered young man who refuses to listen to his lawyer's council.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sweet risks his life to prove that the Sheriff of a neighboring county is guilty of the racially motivated murder of a young man that Sweet was friends with in high school.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: In spring of 1940, Jason practices his music for a town festival

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Kitty meets an injured traveler after Matt breaks a date with her.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and Joe pretend to be part of a gang that robbed a stage coach, but their plan is in danger when the wife of one of the thieves shows up.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: On the trail Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers. Bantry kills Ab Richards, and Len wants Micah to arrest Lucas for the murder. More problems ensue because of this "evil twin."

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is on the trail escorting a prisoner scheduled to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner, Mr. Renolds, as someone who saved Mark's life from a snake bite a few years back.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Bill and Major Adams plan on going hunting with a friend, but when he is not home they suspect a renegade party of Cheyenne who have broken the peace treaty—and the wagon train may be their next target.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The paramedics complain when a rule forbidding squads to cross each other's territories causes them to come late to an accident scene. An elderly woman is treated at the hospital. While transporting a non-vital patient, the paramedics respond to an auto accident. A prisoner breaks out of jail and gets trapped on a ledge.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Clete Roberts has arrived in Korea to interview the staff of the 4077th Mobile Army Surgical Hospital because of its high 97% efficiency rating. In Roberts' interviews with Hawkeye, B.J., Frank, Radar, Klinger, Mulcahy and Potter, they talk about how they cope with their situation, what they miss about home, how they feel about who they work with and whether they see any good in coming from war.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret, calling from Tokyo, holds the camp in suspense until she returns with the news of her engagement to Lieutenant Colonel Donald Penobscott. Frank Burns takes the news hard and arrests a Korean family as spies.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: Out Of Sight, Out Of Mind
programme.desc: While fixing a stove that explodes, Hawkeye's face is badly burned. His eyes are bandaged, and it is not known if he will ever see again. Meanwhile Frank bets on the outcome of a baseball game, which he has already heard on the radio.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Following an offer of promotion made by Master Sergeant Woodruff at a poker game, Radar is promoted to the rank of lieutenant. Finding this position awkward, Radar opts to return to his position as an enlisted man.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bea longs for a special present: a blue bed jacket.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tries to convince everyone of a lack of security at Mayberry Bank, and is furious that no one listens to him. Taking matters into his own hands, he ends up stuck in the bank vault.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: At the mansion, the clan is in need of food because the hunting in Beverly Hills is horrible. They call a catering company, but get mean-mouthed. At the bank, Drysdale gets a call and learns that he got a kangaroo from a friend and it is at his house.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.sub-title: A Matter Of Life And Death
programme.desc: When Ralph thinks he's dying and sells the story to a magazine, he discovers it was a dog who was sick instead.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must get a U.S. general out of Stalag 13, while Klink plans to move the camp's fence line and Gertrude arrives with her fiancé.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Hogan is identified as a saboteur, he impersonates a German officer in front of the very Gestapo agent who could take him down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A Confederate soldier wanders into a town and finds a group of Union soldiers frozen in time. An old man with a black book implores the soldier to use the book's powers to win the Civil War.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Fifty-millionth Frenchman
programme.desc: Frenchman Phillipe falls for a married woman, taking her away from a violently abusive husband. When the ex-husband dies piloting his airplane, Phillipe is blamed for drugging him.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An infant girl is found in a garbage can; Joe and Bill use the child's blanket to track down the mother.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man tries to murder his rich wife by giving her a poisonous snake.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A syndicate boss decides to test an ambitious young man to see if he's good enough to join him.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A former priest who heard a murder confession hires Mannix to find the killer.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A young dancer who teaches at a lonely hearts club winds up dead. One of his clients hires Cannot to find out who killed him. It isn't long before Frank discovers the dancer was also a con man who had bilked several women out of their life savings. And that lengthens the list of suspects considerably.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While investigating a death at a posh sanitarium, Betty discovers a sinister plot to defraud the patients.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: After a bird makes a nest in the smoke stack of the Cannonball, Homer Bedloe uses an unusual case as a means of shutting down the train.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A new supermarket in Pixley finds Sam Drucker's losing all of his customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly comes running to Granny with distressing news, sickness! Fairchild, Elly’s bear, is sick. Meanwhile, at the bank, Miss Jane has a visitor, Lieutenant Mark Templeton of the US Navy. He is Matthew Templeton’s brother. Drysdale kicks the two out, and Jane takes Mark to the Clampetts to meet the beautiful Elly. At this time, Granny made medicine for Elly May’s bear, but Jethro ate it. Elly tries to remake it, but fails, and ends up looking a mess.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts don’t have success with the gorilla they took out of the zoo, they decide to get Herby back. They contact Drysdale who tells Mr. Kelly, but he refuses to do it. Mr. Kelly tells Drysdale he’ll return on his own terms and has Drysdale buy him designer clothes and expensive food. Herby returns to the mansion and starts living the life of luxury, dancing and dining with Elly by the pool.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: It’s The Natural Thing To Do, Olive Oyl And Water Don’t Mix, I Yam Love Sick
programme.desc: "Persuaded by Olive Oyl that the public might like them in a different role, Popeye and Bluto attempt to be sophisticated men-about-town., No sooner do Popeye and his sea-going sidekick, Bluto, agree that "wimmin is bad luck," that Olive gallops up the gangplank of the battleship the boys are on., Popeye plays sick to win Olive's attention."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Switchin' Kitten, Sheep Wrecked, Bowling Alley Cat
programme.desc: "Tom and Jerry enter an old castle on a dark and stormy night which is owned by a mad scientist., Droopy is a sheepherder that has to protect his flock from a wolf., Tom and Jerry are at the bowling alley as mayhem ensues."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Woody's Clip Joint, A Horses Tale, Bee Bopped, Home Sweet Homewrecker, Swiss Mis-fit, Eggnapper, Knock Knock
programme.desc: "A lion escapes from the circus and forces Woody to hide him in a barber shop. Desiring the reward money for the lion's return, Woody instead traps the lion to hand over to the ringmaster., Sugarfoot finds a new job as a stunt double after a misunderstanding gets him kicked off the farm., Windy the bee tries to teach his son the "right" way to steal honey from a beehive. He mostly gets hurt along the way., Woody and Bucky Beaver attempt to destroy each other's homes., A rescue dog tries to prove himself by saving Chilly, but only ends up in trouble himself., When tourist season is over and the park ranger leaves the bears to fend for themselves in winter, Fatso disguishes himself as a female chicken to raid a nearby henhouse., Andy and Papa try to stop Woody from pecking on their roof."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Corny Concerto, Run, Run Sweet Road Runner (1965), Trip For Tat, People Are Bunny, Crockett-doodle-do, Good Noose, Rabbit Hood
programme.desc: "A parody of Disney's Fantasia set in "Corny-Gee Hall". We watch Elmer Fudd, and Bugs Bunny act out a play from "A Tale of Vienna Woods". , Wile E. Coyote attempts numerous ways to catch the Road Runner. , When Granny goes on a world tour with Tweety, Sylvester joins them as a stowaway. It becomes a chase around the world for the little bird. , Daffy hears that a television station is giving away a prize to the first person who can bring in a rabbit. Daffy chases Bugs and traps him in a telephone booth., Foghorn tries to teach the brainy chicken, Egghead Jr., about the great outdoors., Daffy is found as a stowaway aboard large ship. In an effort to avoid being thrown off board he tries entertaining the captain with amateur magic tricks. , While stealing a carrot in Sherwood Forest on the king's property, Bugs gets caught by the sheriff. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Gruesome Games
programme.desc: While on the trail of a scientist who has stolen a vial of deadly germs, the agents are pulled into a night of deadly parlor games. West and Gordon must recover the vial before it bursts and releases a veritable plague while managing to live though the games of their host.

programme.title: Gunsmoke I: Return to Dodge
programme.desc: "Will Mannon is released from a frontier prison and promptly goes in search of the people who put him there some 12 years ago -- Matt Dillon and Kitty Russell."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A wounded Matt Dillon suffers amnesia then falls in love with a widow. It's Matt's first TV kiss, not to Miss Kitty, but to guest star Michael Learned.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jamie befriends an old man known as Honest John, urging him to rebuild an old wagon so he can leave the Ponderosa.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A professional card player, John Keeler, has set up business in North Fork, but local Jesse Phillips claims that this tinhorn is a cheat. Lucas starts playing poker with Keeler to draw him out.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing—and a very strong grip.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Mushy is swindled out of the wagons and the remuda. He is fired, kidnapped by gypsies and sold into slavery.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Learning of his son's death, a rich man hires Paladin to locate the daughter-in-law he's never met, but Paladin finds two women both claiming to be her.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh delivers Dan Murdock, wanted for multiple murders in Mesa City. He learns that the local sheriff is the brother of Crazy Horse's deputy, one of the victims, and it's unlikely that Murdock will arrive safely. Josh goes along to make sure that he does.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Woman Haters, Three Little Sew And Sews, Nutty But Nice, Fuelin' Around, Commotion On The Ocean, Of Cash And Hash
programme.desc: "The Stooges join the "Women Haters" club and vow to have nothing to do with the fair sex. Larry marries a girl anyway and attempts to hide the fact from Moe and Curly as they take a train trip. , The Stooges are sailors working in a ships' tailor shop. When they can't get passes to go ashore, they steal officers' uniforms and go to a party with Curly passing himself off as Admiral Taylor and Moe and Larry as his aides. Two spies, one of them a beautiful woman, trick the Stooges into stealing a new submarine. The boys turn the table on the spies and capture them. When the real Admiral shows up, Curly's reenacts the capture and accidentally detonates a bomb, blowing them all to kingdom come. , The Stooges witness an armed robbery and are brought in by the cops as suspects. After passing a lie detector test, the boys are freed and go back to their jobs in a Cafe. When one of the robbers comes into the Cafe, the boys recognize him and along with their friend Gladys trail him to a spooky house in the country where the crooks are hiding out. The bad guys abduct Gladys and the Stooges must rescue her. [A remake of "Shivering Sherlocks".] , The Stooges are singing waiters who are enlisted by a doctor to try and cheer up a little girl. It seems that the girl's father is a banker who was kidnapped with $300,000 worth of bonds. Failing to cheer up the girl, the Stooges go out looking for the father and by a series of coincidences wind up in the bad guys hideout. The villains return and after a wild fight the boys free the missing man. , The Stooges are carpet layers working in the home of a scientist, Professor Sneed, who has invented a super rocket fuel. Larry is mistaken for the professor by foreign agents who kidnap the trio and take them to the country of Anemia where they are ordered to produce the rocket fuel or be executed. The boys come up with a concoction they try to pass of as the real stuff, but are exposed when the real professor and his daughter are also kidnapped. The Stooges help them escape, using their secret formula to fuel a jeep. , The Stooges are would-be reporters, who are tricked into becoming stowaways by "Borscht", a spy for an enemy country. Stranded on a freighter on the high seas, they discover that Borscht has concealed some stolen microfilm in watermelons they brought aboard for him. After a wild chase, they subdue Borscht and recover the microfilm. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "Three horror stories about a vintage car that transports its driver back to 1926, the mistress of an old Victorian mansion who is scared of a vampire and a mother tormented by her dead son who she has brought back to life."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: After recent heroic feats, the Penguin announces his Penguin Protection Agency, intended to protect the wealth of Gotham City's society crowd.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a vast alien ship that sets out to test them.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind freezes away Superman's powers and intimidates people from voting against his crooked candidate for Metropolis' mayor.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: Perry White discovers a formula that can extract uranium from seawater. Crooks discover it and torpedo his cottage.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: The Robinsons manage to construct a small space ship that they plan to use to return to Earth. Dr. Smith and Will launch the craft but wind up returning back on the original planet.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: A life-like robot uses the Seaview to seize control of the world.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: While fleeing the giants, Steve is exposed to hallucinogenic mushroom spores and becomes a raving paranoid who makes an alliance with Inspector Kobick to turn in his fellow Earthlings.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: In 13th-century England, Tony and Doug join Robin Hood's revolt against evil King John.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent close in on a supposed prophet who glows in a way similar to the aliens.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "Jack finds a gold nugget while seeing Sumi (a female Indian) home and takes off to find more."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin goes unarmed deep into the jungles of India to film the adventures of a full-grown Bengal tigress and her two young cubs."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Travel with Marlin and his band of adventurers as they explore the Golf of California, the last great unexplored marine paradise in the Western hemisphere, lying between the Mexican main land and Baja, California."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "There’s a legend that during the 16th century, Spanish ponies from a sinking galleon swam ashore to the island of Assateague, Virginia. Today, once a year, men from neighboring Chincoteague Island gather for one of the most unusual roundups."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin travels to Gir Forest in India in search of the king of beasts…the lion."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim visit the mountain prairies of Wyoming where falcons, eagles and hawks rule the air."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim follow a pair of black bear cubs in Yellowstone National Park; track a large black bear to tag for future reference."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: After Bobby pushes Peter out of the way of a falling ladder, Peter volunteers to be Bobby's slave for life, a situation Bobby takes advantage of. Meanwhile, the girls try to decide on a wallpaper for their room.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The day after Carol reads Mike's horoscope, which states "a strange woman will enter your life tomorrow," a difficult and demanding female client begins to dominate Mike's time, keeping him away from home.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Fonzie and Chachi's grandmother becomes very upset at them for suggesting that she move into a retirement home after they observe signs of senility.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for losing Laverne's favorite purse and then lying about it, Shirley dreams that her friend is trying to kill her to get even.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie must learn to defend himself against a bully.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: "Lucy disguises a block of cheese as a baby in order to take it aboard a flight."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally is throwing a party and is successful in getting Beaver out of the house, who is planning to spend the night at Whitey's. However, on the way to Whitey's house, he and Beaver get into an argument over a billboard that is advertising soup, leading Beaver to fall into the giant soup bowl mounted at the top of the billboard.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver volunteers to go around the neighborhood and collect for the Community Chest in June's place after she decides to attend Wally's open house at his school. Beaver brings along Gilbert and thanks to Beaver's astronomical mistake of losing the collection can, chaos erupts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny checks on Mark to make sure he is all human. When she sees that he is, she is ready for him to marry Elly May, giving hints. Elly and Mark sit in the parlor, trying to be alone, but keep getting interrupted by the family, mostly Granny and Jethro. Even when they think they are alone, Jethro is watching them, but Elly chases him out. Granny decides to head to the bank and, since she helped her out, brings Miss Jane a frog to kiss, only if she wants to.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally arrive at Clampett Castle, and meet Mr. Faversham, who they call Major Domo after a misunderstanding with his name, also mistaking his name for a greeting. Granny decides to check on Marcus, but doesn’t know that the dog of the house is sitting in his bed. She feels the dog through the curtain and thinks the staff and doctors have been neglecting him. Jethro is working on fulfilling his duty as a knight and decides to start hunting dragons.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: Gilligan thinks he is doomed after being bitten by a yellow and green bug. Soon, the other castaways also are bitten by the same bug.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: While fishing, Gilligan pulls a WWII mine out of the lagoon. When the Professor is unable to deactivate the mine, Gilligan tows it back into the lagoon, where it harmlessly explodes.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Bubba announces that he’s going to marry the daughter of Mama's hated neighbor, Mama is forced to make peace. But when the engagement is broken, the feud starts anew.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Iola declares her independence from her mother... and moves in with Mama. Now, the family unites with a single purpose: get Iola out of the house.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A woman falls for a man's claim of a year of celibacy; a woman's bridge partners hinder her romance; Stubing makes Vicki his secretary.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is goaded into ticketing the governor's car and mistakenly believes Andy is setting him up for a dressing-down by the governor.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "They say to do what you love, and Shawn Peterson loves PEZ. After years of collecting rare dispensers, candies, and other company artifacts, Shawn successfully pitched a PEZ Visitor Center at the company’s historic and still-functioning factory, where he now manages and shares his collection with 80,000 visitors a year. He also shares his collection with Collector’s Call, taking Lisa, and PEZ Price Guide expert and appraiser, John LaSpina, on a ride through PEZ history, including: a 1940s PEZ Girl uniform, a rare Colonel Sanders prototype, and a giant edible candy tablet that you can only acquire if you’re invited to the headquarters factory in Germany. John appraises Shawn’s collection and attempts a trade, offering an ultra rare set and display featured in a Montgomery Ward catalogue in exchange for a dispenser from the 1984 Winter Olympics. Also, Shawn shows Lisa around the PEZ factory and takes her behind-the-scenes of the candy-making process."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Hot Lips confines Nurse Baker to her quarters, little does she know that Baker's husband has arrived in the camp. Hawkeye and B.J. put them together in Hot Lips' tent, telling everyone that a quarantined patient has been placed there. When Hot Lips discovers what has happened, she breaks down and refuses to press charges.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After hearing that North Korean prisoners have been released in the area, everyone is upset when Margaret disappears. Colonel Flagg is called in to investigate, and bungles things in his usual manner.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The Bunkers bid fond farewell to the Jeffersons when their neighbors abandon Queens for the nouveau-riche life in a Manhattan high rise.[This episode was the pilot for "The Jeffersons."]

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria gives Edith a lesson in marriage assertiveness.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith is surprised to discover that her cousin Amelia's ideal marriage is rotten to the core.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's steals a box of nails from work and finds himself at the center of a household debate on morality.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, And Julie Bond
programme.desc: "Guests Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, and Julie Bond. Originally aired on 12/14/70."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Bing Crosby, Ella Fitzgerald, And Rowan & Martin
programme.desc: "Guests Bing Crosby, Ella Fitzgerald, and Rowan & Martin. Originally aired on 11/10/69."

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: You Ought To Be In Pictures
programme.desc: Rob is cast in a movie with all sorts of trouble.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Helpers are jealous of the Petries' new neighbors.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Norton is sleepwalking and Ralph gets stuck looking after him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Incredible World Of Horace Ford
programme.desc: A toy designer who longs for his idyllic childhood gets a bitter taste of reality when he finds himself transported to the past.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A unique society has a different method for preparing for the future.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Gregory Tolan leads an underground cell specializing in bank robberies with the money going to finance an American revolution. His mysterious sponsor is Jonathan Brace, who runs other such cells throughout the U.S. The IMF must find out Brace's identity and stop his operation.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While traveling through a small Oklahoma town, Kimble is arrested because the police have mistaken him for Leonard Hull, a former numbers runner about to testify against a big-time racketeer. The racketeer has run away from a witness relocation program in

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Harry Orwell looks for a clue of murder in the apparent suicide of an alcoholic ex-cop."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives investigate a complaint that two veteran officers stole funds.
